title: Are AI Trading Bots/Indicators Legit?
author: Great_Customer_3634
selftext:
I’ve recently been coming across a lot of people promoting AI trading bots that just trade 24/7 and turn a profit; or an indicator that overlays a chart you’re watching and supposedly tell you when to buy/sell to generate profits. 

This seems like a case of too good to be true, and if it legitimately worked consistently everyone would be using them and you’d be hearing a lot more about them. 

Are any of these legit? Are there bots you can literally just set and forget and let it trade for it? If so which direction should I be looking.
